content.text: Looking at this, the baseline shows BRAM18=0 despite having `rom_style="block"` attributes. The issue is that the weight read happens inside a complex conditional (`if (!mac_done_issuing)`) within the main FSM always block — Vivado prefers a textbook unconditional synchronous read in a dedicated always block for clean BRAM inference. I'll separate the weight read into its own clocked always block with no reset and no enable. This is the canonical pattern Vivado matches.
